category_sources: source_facts.description says cmark is a strongly specified, highly compatible implementation of Markdown.
source_facts.repo points to the official commonmark/cmark repository.
display_name_sources: Official commonmark/cmark repository uses cmark as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents cmark as the implementation project.
source_facts.homepage is the official CommonMark site for the specification context.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/commonmark/cmark, so repo was returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.repo identifies the official commonmark/cmark implementation repository.
